title: Twice-Cooked Potatoes
description: A simple and flavorful side dish that brings out the natural sweetness of potatoes. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the potatoes and fry for 5 minutes until they start to brown.
Remove the potatoes from the pan and set aside.
Return the pan to the heat and add more oil if necessary.
Increase the heat to medium-high and fry the potatoes again until crispy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
